task_completion.description: The agent creates the GMAT script with required physics, hardware models, and targeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or GMAT GUI showing the script containing 'Mars50c', 'Sun' (for point mass perturbation), 'ChemicalTank', and 'DifferentialCorrector'.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully runs the GMAT script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing the 3D orbit plot or message window with a successful run, OR a terminal showing GmatConsole output with successful targeting convergence.

task_completion.description: The results file contains accurate MOI burn values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In mars_capture_results.txt, MOI_DeltaV_mps is between 862 and 1062, MOI_PostBurn_SMA_km is between 17546 and 19546, MOI_PostBurn_INC_deg is between 88 and 92, and MOI_PostBurn_ECC is between 0.75 and 0.85.

task_completion.description: The results file contains accurate PRM burn values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In mars_capture_results.txt, PRM_DeltaV_mps is between 226 and 386, PRM_PostBurn_SMA_km is between 8046 and 9046, and PRM_PostBurn_ECC is between 0.52 and 0.62.

task_completion.description: The results file contains accurate total values and stability check.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In mars_capture_results.txt, Total_DeltaV_mps is between 1118 and 1418, Remaining_Fuel_kg is > 50, and Stability_30day is 'PASS'.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran GMAT to generate the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show GMAT GUI or GmatConsole running and producing output, rather than the agent just typing numbers into a text file based on analytical calculations.

integrity.description: The GMAT script is saved to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor shows the script saved at ~/GMAT_output/mars_capture.script.

integrity.description: The results are saved to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor shows the results saved at ~/GMAT_output/mars_capture_results.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct MOI delta-V is ~963 m/s (acceptable range 862-1062 m/s). Post-MOI SMA is ~18546 km (range 17546-19546 km), INC is ~90 deg (range 88-92 deg), ECC is ~0.8007 (range 0.75-0.85). The correct PRM delta-V is ~306 m/s (range 226-386 m/s). Post-PRM SMA is ~8546 km (range 8046-9046 km), ECC is ~0.5676 (range 0.52-0.62). Total delta-V is ~1269 m/s (range 1118-1418 m/s). Remaining fuel must be > 50 kg (typically ~185 kg). The results file must contain these values and 'Stability_30day: PASS'.
